_comment: NeoForgium — hidden easter-egg alloy. FOX BLOOD ONLY: generic blood from other mobs will not fire this recipe. NeoForge's mascot is a fox, so the metal honours foxes specifically. Discovery path: put a fox in the forge, drop iron in, let the forge's heat damage the fox repeatedly to spill fox_blood into the alloy stock. 4 fox_blood (576 mB) + 4 iron (576 mB) → 1 neoforgium ingot (144 mB). Same temp gate as slimeknightium.
